---
title: "TajimasD"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-09-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{bash}
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH -J tajD_wild
#SBATCH --array=1-10
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=1
#SBATCH --time=24:00:00
#SBATCH --mem=16G
#SBATCH --partition=jclarke,batch,guest
#SBATCH --output=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajD/wild_%A_%a.out
#SBATCH --error=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajD/wild_%A_%a.err

module load vcftools
#set -euo pipefail

VCF=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/wild_50_samples.recode.vcf
OUTDIR=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/wild

CHR=${SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID}
vcftools --vcf ${VCF} \
  --chr ${CHR} \
  --TajimaD 10000 \
  --out ${OUTDIR}/wild.tajD.chr${CHR}
```


```{bash}
# Go to your output directory
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/wild

# Keep header from chr1, drop headers from the rest
head -n 1 wild.tajD.chr1.Tajima.D > wild.tajD.all.Tajima.D
tail -n +2 -q wild.tajD.chr*.Tajima.D >> wild.tajD.all.Tajima.D

```




```{bash}
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH -J tajD_land
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=1
#SBATCH --time=24:00:00
#SBATCH --mem=16G
#SBATCH --partition=jclarke,batch,guest
#SBATCH --output=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/land/land_%j.out
#SBATCH --error=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/land/land_%j.err

module load vcftools

VCF=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/landraces.recode.vcf
OUTDIR=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/land
#mkdir -p "$OUTDIR"

vcftools --vcf ${VCF} \
  --TajimaD 10000 \
  --out ${OUTDIR}/land.tajD
```

```{bash}
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH -J tajD_imp
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=1
#SBATCH --time=24:00:00
#SBATCH --mem=16G
#SBATCH --partition=jclarke,batch,guest
#SBATCH --output=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/imp/imp_%j.out
#SBATCH --error=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/imp/imp_%j.err

module load vcftools

VCF=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/imp_129_samples.recode.vcf
OUTDIR=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/imp
#mkdir -p "$OUTDIR"

vcftools --vcf ${VCF} \
  --TajimaD 10000 \
  --out ${OUTDIR}/imp.tajD
```



```{bash}
W_IN=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/wild/wild.tajD.all.Tajima.D
L_IN=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/land/land.tajD.Tajima.D
I_IN=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/imp/imp.tajD.Tajima.D

W_PEAK=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/wild/wild.top1.ext5k.bed
L_PEAK=/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/3.results/B2/land.top1.ext5k.bed
I_PEAK=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/imp/imp.top1.ext5k.bed

OUTDIR=/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD
```

```{bash}
# Wild
awk 'NR>1 && $4!="nan" && $4!="NaN" {
  s = $2 - 1; if (s < 0) s = 0;
  print $1, s, $2 + 10000, $4
}' OFS="\t" "$W_IN" > "$OUTDIR/wild.tajD.10kb.bed"

# Landrace
awk 'NR>1 && $4!="nan" && $4!="NaN" {
  s = $2 - 1; if (s < 0) s = 0;
  print $1, s, $2 + 10000, $4
}' OFS="\t" "$L_IN" > "$OUTDIR/land.tajD.10kb.bed"
# Improved
awk 'NR>1 && $4!="nan" && $4!="NaN" {
  s = $2 - 1; if (s < 0) s = 0;
  print $1, s, $2 + 10000, $4
}' OFS="\t" "$I_IN" > "$OUTDIR/imp.tajD.10kb.bed"

```



```{bash}
module load bedtools

# Wild
bedtools intersect -wa -a "$OUTDIR/wild.tajD.10kb.bed" -b "$W_PEAK" \
  | awk 'BEGIN{OFS="\t"}{print $0,"PEAK","Wild"}' > "$OUTDIR/wild.peak.tsv"
bedtools intersect -v  -a "$OUTDIR/wild.tajD.10kb.bed" -b "$W_PEAK" \
  | awk 'BEGIN{OFS="\t"}{print $0,"BACKGROUND","Wild"}' > "$OUTDIR/wild.bg.tsv"
cat "$OUTDIR/wild.peak.tsv" "$OUTDIR/wild.bg.tsv" > "$OUTDIR/wild_labeled_tajD.txt"


# Landrace
bedtools intersect -wa -a "$OUTDIR/land.tajD.10kb.bed" -b "$L_PEAK" \
 | awk 'BEGIN{OFS="\t"}{print $0,"PEAK","Landrace"}' > "$OUTDIR/land.peak.tsv"
bedtools intersect -v  -a "$OUTDIR/land.tajD.10kb.bed" -b "$L_PEAK" \
 | awk 'BEGIN{OFS="\t"}{print $0,"BACKGROUND","Landrace"}' > "$OUTDIR/land.bg.tsv"
cat "$OUTDIR/land.peak.tsv" "$OUTDIR/land.bg.tsv" > "$OUTDIR/land_labeled_tajD.txt"

# Improved
bedtools intersect -wa -a "$OUTDIR/imp.tajD.10kb.bed" -b "$I_PEAK" \
 | awk 'BEGIN{OFS="\t"}{print $0,"PEAK","Improved"}' > "$OUTDIR/imp.peak.tsv"
bedtools intersect -v  -a "$OUTDIR/imp.tajD.10kb.bed" -b "$I_PEAK" \
 | awk 'BEGIN{OFS="\t"}{print $0,"BACKGROUND","Improved"}' > "$OUTDIR/imp.bg.tsv"
cat "$OUTDIR/imp.peak.tsv" "$OUTDIR/imp.bg.tsv" > "$OUTDIR/imp_labeled_tajD.txt"

```

```{r}
library(readr); library(dplyr); library(ggplot2)

OUTDIR <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/"

colspec <- cols(
  chr = col_character(),
  start = col_integer(),
  end = col_integer(),
  TajimaD = col_double(),
  class = col_character(),
  pop = col_character()
)

# read
w <- read_tsv(file.path(OUTDIR, "wild_labeled_tajD.txt"),
              col_names=c("chr","start","end","TajimaD","class","pop"),
              col_types=colspec)
l <- read_tsv(file.path(OUTDIR, "land_labeled_tajD.txt"),
              col_names=c("chr","start","end","TajimaD","class","pop"),
              col_types=colspec)
i <- read_tsv(file.path(OUTDIR, "imp_labeled_tajD.txt"),
              col_names=c("chr","start","end","TajimaD","class","pop"),
              col_types=colspec)

dat <- bind_rows(w,l,i) %>%
  filter(is.finite(TajimaD)) %>%
  mutate(
    class = factor(class, levels = c("BACKGROUND","PEAK")),
    # put panels in the order you want
    pop   = factor(pop,   levels = c("Wild","Landrace","Improved"))
  )

# medians for labels
meds <- dat %>%
  group_by(pop, class) %>%
  summarise(med = median(TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# same y for all facets: use global max and give headroom for the star bracket
ymax <- max(dat$TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE)
ystar <- ymax * 0.95  # where to draw the significance bracket
ylims <- c(min(dat$TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE), ymax * 1.05)

stats <- dat %>%
  group_by(pop) %>%
  summarise(
    n_peak   = sum(class=="PEAK"),
    n_bg     = sum(class=="BACKGROUND"),
    med_peak = median(TajimaD[class=="PEAK"], na.rm=TRUE),
    med_bg   = median(TajimaD[class=="BACKGROUND"], na.rm=TRUE),
    p_wilcox = wilcox.test(TajimaD[class=="PEAK"], TajimaD[class=="BACKGROUND"])$p.value,
    .groups  = "drop"
  )
stats

# plot
p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = class, y = TajimaD, fill = class)) +
  geom_violin(width = 0.9, trim = TRUE, color = "black", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.shape = NA, color = "black") +
  # median text
  geom_text(data = meds,
            aes(x = class, y = med, label = sprintf("%.2f", med)),
            vjust = -0.8, size = 3, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # significance stars (Wilcoxon) for each facet
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("BACKGROUND","PEAK")),
    test = "wilcox.test",
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    y_position = ystar,
    tip_length = 0.01
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ pop, nrow = 1, scales = "fixed") +  # same y across panels
  coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(BACKGROUND = "grey75", PEAK = "#ffb000")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Tajima's D", title = "") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("tajimasD_violin_allpops_with_stars.png",
       p, width = 10, height = 3.8, dpi = 600)

# Wilcoxon stats table (unchanged)
#write.csv(stats, file.path(OUTDIR, "tajimasD_peak_vs_bg_wilcoxon.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```
# A tibble: 3 × 6
  pop      n_peak  n_bg med_peak med_bg  p_wilcox
  <fct>     <int> <int>    <dbl>  <dbl>     <dbl>
1 Wild       1582 63360    0.770 -1.36  0        
2 Landrace   1126 63432    1.17  -1.07  2.14e-307
3 Improved    953 63413    1.60  -0.617 1.47e-215


```{r}
library(dplyr)

read_lab <- function(path) {
  read.table(path, header = FALSE, sep = "\t",
             col.names = c("chr","start","end","tajD","SET","POP"),
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

# load your three labeled files
wild <- read_lab("/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/wild_labeled_tajD.txt")
lan  <- read_lab("/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/land_labeled_tajD.txt")
imp  <- read_lab("/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/imp_labeled_tajD.txt")
all3 <- bind_rows(wild, lan, imp)

# Downsampled background = sample n_peak windows from BACKGROUND per population
set.seed(42)
ds <- all3 %>%
  group_by(POP) %>%
  mutate(n_peak = sum(SET=="PEAK")) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    pk  <- filter(.x, SET=="PEAK")
    bg  <- filter(.x, SET=="BACKGROUND")
    bgS <- if (nrow(bg) >= unique(pk$n_peak)) bg %>% slice_sample(n = unique(pk$n_peak)) else bg
    bind_rows(pk, bgS)
  }) %>% ungroup()

# Stats (Wilcoxon) per pop
stats_ds <- ds %>%
  group_by(POP) %>%
  summarise(
    n_peak = sum(SET=="PEAK"),
    n_bg   = sum(SET=="BACKGROUND"),
    med_peak = median(tajD[SET=="PEAK"], na.rm=TRUE),
    med_bg   = median(tajD[SET=="BACKGROUND"], na.rm=TRUE),
    p_wilcox = wilcox.test(tajD[SET=="PEAK"], tajD[SET=="BACKGROUND"])$p.value,
    .groups="drop"
  )
stats_ds


# ---- Plot Tajima's D: Peak vs Downsampled Background (Plan B) ----
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Ensure nice ordering/labels
ds_plot <- ds %>%
  mutate(
    SET = factor(SET, levels = c("BACKGROUND","PEAK")),
    POP = factor(POP, levels = c("Improved","Landrace","Wild"))
  )

p <- ggplot(ds_plot, aes(x = SET, y = tajD, fill = SET)) +
  geom_violin(trim = TRUE, width = 0.9, alpha = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, color = "black", alpha = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ POP, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(BACKGROUND = "grey75", PEAK = "#f7a600")) +
  labs(
    title = "Tajima's D in B2 peak windows vs downsampled background (10 kb)",
    x = NULL, y = "Tajima's D"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# Show in R
p

# Save a high-res PNG (edit path as you like)
ggsave("tajD_violin_planB.png", p, width = 11, height = 4, dpi = 300)


meds <- ds_plot %>%
  group_by(POP, SET) %>%
  summarise(med = median(tajD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p + geom_text(
  data = meds,
  aes(x = SET, y = med, label = sprintf("median = %.2f", med)),
  vjust = -1.0, size = 4
)
```
